mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (product_id, seckill_activity_id, total_stock, sold_stock, remaining_stock, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{seckillActivityId}, #{totalStock}, #{soldStock}, #{remainingStock}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET sold_stock = CASE WHEN sold_stock >= #{quantity} THEN sold_stock - #{quantity} ELSE 0 END, remaining_stock = remaining_stock + #{quantity}, update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 WHERE seckill_activity_id = #{seckillActivityId}
